title: Cosmere Tools & Armor
description: Tools, armor and metalminds for the discerning Worldhopper.
body:
# Welcome to The Cosmere!
[![](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/short_475343_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmere/files) [![](https://img.shields.io/discord/828383636465123328.svg?color=purple&label=Discord&style=flat-square)](https://discord.gg/VjAGzeJvAu)

## Overview

The Cosmere is a universe devised by [Brandon Sanderson](https://www.amazon.com/Brandon-Sanderson/e/B001IGFHW6), encompassing many worlds, each with their own variation of magic.
This collection of mods aim to bring all of that to Minecraft itself... eventually.

## This is a tools mod!
That means this mods functionality is largely around providing extra crafting recipes related to tools and armor. In the future, we also want to give those new items metalmind functionality if you use our [Feruchemy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/feruchemist) mod. This is not currently in the mod right now. 

## Inter-Mod Compatibilities
**(Required!) [The Cosmere Library Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmere)**  - as it provides the metal ingots needed to craft the new items

**(Optional) [Feruchemy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/feruchemist)** - Allowing you to use the metal items and armor as feruchemical storage. _Again, not currently in the mod right now!_

## Got something to say?
Consider dropping by the [discord server dedicated to this mod](https://discord.gg/VjAGzeJvAu)! 

## Patreon/Donations
Like what we do? [consider supporting us on patreon](https://www.patreon.com/leafreynolds)! -
